mapper.select:
select c.status as `key`, c.status as `name`, count(1) as `count` from cases c
group by c.status order by count(1) desc

select c.type_code as `key`, coalesce(dct.name, c.type_code) as `name`, count(1) as `count` from cases c left join dict_case_types dct on dct.code = c.type_code
group by c.type_code, dct.name order by count(1) desc

select date_format(c.created_at, #{periodFormat}) as period, count(1) as `count` from cases c
group by date_format(c.created_at, #{periodFormat}) order by period asc

select coalesce(nullif(c.incident_location, ''), dep.name, 'UNKNOWN') as region, count(1) as case_count from cases c left join departments dep on dep.id = c.department_id
group by coalesce(nullif(c.incident_location, ''), dep.name, 'UNKNOWN') order by case_count desc limit #{topN}
